rule.name: O365 Email Reported By Admin Found Malicious
rule.description: The following analytic detects when an email manually submitted to Microsoft through the Security & Compliance portal is found to be malicious. This capability is an enhanced protection feature that can be used within o365 tenants by administrative users to report potentially malicious emails. This correlation looks for any submission that returns a Phish or Malware verdict upon submission.
rule.query:
`o365_management_activity` Workload=SecurityComplianceCenter Operation=AdminSubmission
  | search RescanVerdict IN (Phish,Malware)
  | rename Id as signature_id, SenderIP as src, Recipients{} as dest_user, P1Sender as src_user
  | fillnull
  | stats count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime
    BY dest user src
       vendor_account vendor_product signature
       signature_id dest_user src_user
       Subject SubmissionContent
  | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)`
  | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
  | `o365_email_reported_by_admin_found_malicious_filter`
false_positives: Administrators that submit known phishing training exercises.
